Men's Basketball Schedule Roster Coaches Statistics Additional Links

2025-26 Men's Basketball Roster

13 Adel Masad

  • Position G
  • Year Freshman
  • Height 5-11
  • Weight 165
  • Hometown Columbus, Ohio
  • High School IMG Academy
  • Major Business
  • Bio
  • Related
  • Stats

Biography

Awards
Academic All-G-MAC (2025-26)

2025-26: Academic All-G-MAC recipient...Appeared in three games...Scored his first collegiate points during a 12-point performance against Penn State-Du Bois (12/20)......Averaged 5.3 minutes per game.

High School: Averaged 16.4 points per game and 3.5 assists per game...Three-year letter winner...Team captain.

Personal: Son of Kamelia Masad...Majoring in a course study of Business witha minor in Finance...Pursuing a career as a professional basketball player.
